input.background: We've established that heights of 10-year-old boys vary according to a Normal distribution with μ=138 centimeters and σ=7 centimeters.
input.question: What proportion is less than 140 centimeters in height?

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性
output.answer: The proportion of the population less than 140 centimeters tall is 0.6141.

height.description: The height of 10-year-old boys, which follows a Normal distribution.

mean_height.description: The mean height of 10-year-old boys, which is 138 centimeters.

std_dev_height.description: The standard deviation of the height of 10-year-old boys, which is 7 centimeters.

threshold_height.description: The threshold height to determine the proportion of boys shorter than this height.
